creator: steve@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Make sure you build and install a new version of as(1) first.  Just doing 
a 'make world' should take care of the ordering for you.  If you are 
upgrading from an a.out to ELF -current you will want do a complete a.out 
build first, then a 'make aout-to-elf'.  See /usr/src/Makefile.upgrade for 
more details.
